chunks.title: Exhortations Before Battle
chunks.reason: A continuous speech by the priest and officers encouraging the troops and granting exemptions.

chunks.title: Rules for Conquering Cities
chunks.reason: Legal instructions distinguishing between distant cities and local Canaanite nations regarding peace terms and destruction.

chunks.title: Rules for Siege Warfare
chunks.reason: Specific regulations concerning the treatment of trees during a prolonged siege.
